name: GSD Execution Bridge
description: Bridges the Get-Shit-Done (GSD) framework .planning/ state into OpenClaw's RalphClaw execution loop via LOOP-QUEUE.md. Provides deterministic task synchronisation, slash-command aliases, and atomic task dispatching.
author: OpenClaw Integration Layer

configSchema.title: GsdBridgeConfig
configSchema.description: Configuration for the GSD ↔ OpenClaw execution bridge.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the active project workspace that contains the .planning/ directory.

syncIntervalMs.description: Interval in milliseconds between automatic GSD→Queue synchronisation cycles.

gsdStatefile.description: Name of the GSD state file inside .planning/ to parse for TODO tasks.

queueFile.description: Path to the LOOP-QUEUE.md file relative to projectRoot. Defaults to .openclaw/LOOP-QUEUE.md.

inboxFile.description: Path to the LOOP-INBOX.md file relative to projectRoot. Defaults to .openclaw/LOOP-INBOX.md.
